name: Retro Terminal
author: akellainmotion
description: Monospace type, green on black, scanline textures, CRT glow effects

componentOverrides.button: border border-green-400 rounded-none bg-transparent text-green-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-green-400/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,65,0.4)]
componentOverrides.card: border border-green-400/50 rounded-none bg-black/80 text-green-400 font-mono
componentOverrides.input: border border-green-400/50 rounded-none bg-transparent text-green-400 font-mono placeholder:text-green-400/30 focus:border-green-400 focus:shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,65,0.3)]
componentOverrides.badge: border border-green-400/50 rounded-none bg-green-400/10 text-green-400 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase
componentOverrides.alert: border border-green-400 rounded-none bg-green-400/5 text-green-400 font-mono p-4
